news_items.headline: Royals vs Guardians, Game 35 Gamethread
news_items.summary: The Royals have a chance to gain ground on a division leader.

news_items.headline: GAME THREAD: Guardians at Royals, game 36 of 162
The San Francisco Jedi
news_items.summary: It’s the unofficial Star Wars celebration day out there and while I don’t condone it, I recognize that I’m in the minority. For one thing, I’m a Star Trek guy. And the other thing is I think it’s incredibly dumb to use a speech impairment as the basis for celebration. Also, what are we celebrating? […]

news_items.headline: Tarik Skubal's elbow is now MLB's biggest mystery. His recovery time from surgery could be difference between a $250M and $450M deal
news_items.summary: Skubal, in his final year of team control, is set to hit the open market this winter. The industry consensus is that the two-time Cy Young will break the record for the biggest contract ever handed to a pitcher.

news_items.headline: Game #35 GameThread: Jays @ Rays
news_items.summary: So the Jays don’t appear to be using an opener today, it is Eric Lauer right from the first pitch. Let’s have a good start Eric. And there is no Heineman or Springer. Springer is supposed to be available off the bench and he’s supposed to be starting tomorrow. We’ll see I guess. That ball […]

news_items.headline: New York Yankees vs. Baltimore Orioles: Cam Schlittler vs. Shane Baz
Monday night Orioles game thread: @ Yankees, 7:05
news_items.summary: I would like to request one win, please.

news_items.headline: Sean Murphy returns to Braves’ lineup in Seattle
news_items.summary: You’ve read that right, Sean Murphy has been reinstated from the IL to the Atlanta Braves’ roster after returning from his rehab assignment with the Gwinnett Stripers. This, in turn, led the club to DFA Jonah Heim. Murphy has seen productive numbers while on rehab, driving in 4 runs, leading the team with 8 hits […]
